scripts.dev:all: concurrently -n web,ext,srv -c blue,green,magenta "bun run --cwd web dev" "bun run --cwd extension dev" "bun run --cwd server dev"
scripts.build: bun run --cwd web build && bun run --cwd extension build
scripts.lint: bun run --cwd web lint && bun run --cwd extension lint && bun run --cwd server lint
